bmiMaenner.title: BMI Calculator Men
bmiMaenner.description: Calculate your BMI with men-specific interpretation notes.
bmiMaenner.contentHeading: BMI in men: muscle and visceral fat
bmiMaenner.content: BMI is a useful screening metric for men but should be interpreted with body composition in mind. Higher muscle mass can increase BMI without excess body fat, while abdominal fat can raise risk even with moderate BMI. Combine BMI with waist-based measures for better assessment.

faq.q: Why can athletes have high BMI?
faq.a: More muscle mass increases body weight and can elevate BMI despite low body-fat levels.

faq.q: Why is waist size important for men?
faq.a: Abdominal fat is strongly associated with cardiometabolic risk and should be assessed alongside BMI.
Waist circumference, waist-to-hip ratio, and body-fat assessment improve interpretation.
